mission.title: dify: Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function
mission.description: Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function. This issue affects 12+ users.

steps.title: Identify dify analyze symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your dify deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify -n dify --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review dify configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dify configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
kubectl get configmap -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dify
```
### Self Checks

### 1. Is this request related to a challenge you're experiencing? Tell me about your story.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function
steps.description:
> [!IMPORTANT]
>
> 1. Make sure you have read our [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/langgenius/dify/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
> 1. Ensure there is an associated issue and you have been assigned to it
> 1. Use the correct syntax to link this PR: `Fixes #<issue number>`.

## Summary

fix #13738 support seperate memory config

| ... | ... |

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Confirm Enhancement of LLM Node Memory Function is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify -n dify --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n dify --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
